taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Software Design, Software Architecture, Design Patterns, System Reliability
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Software Design:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Design Patterns:0.0, System Reliability:0.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience, 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience, Experience programming with at least one software programming language

job_summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is a leading cloud platform that provides business applications to millions of companies worldwide. They are seeking a Software Dev Engineer II to innovate and develop the next generation of Amazon Connect, a cloud-based contact center that leverages AI and AWS services to enhance customer service experiences.
